title: Sticks are Weapons
description: Buffs all stick-type items, making them do 1 heart of damage in an emergency
body:
# | DESCRIPTION | Buffs the attack damage from these items (stick, debug stick, breeze rod, blaze rod) by 1/2 heart (the total damage is 1 heart for a normal hit) as a makeshift weapon, such as when you die at night and need to fight mobs.
For 26.1.X and later, adds an effect similar to fire aspect (blaze) and knockback (breeze) to those rods. The effect is achieved by modifying a loot table, and may be overridden by other packs. Order will affect which pack's custom loot is dropped. Enchanted rods have name color changed to blue, and do not appear in the creative inventory.
![Image of a stick, debug stick, blaze rod, and breeze rod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/590a815d32f1c47fd141be5ee327020998c45718.png) # | VERSIONS | Currently supports Minecraft Java ```1.21 - 26.1.2```. 26.1.2 has an extra enchantment effect. # | COMPATIBILITY | Incompatible with packs using the same function, tag, or attribute names (highly unlikely), or 26.1.x packs that modify the loot tables of the blaze and breeze. You can choose which loot table to use; if you would like the enchantment effect put this pack on top. If you like the other pack's modifications more, put it on top. Enchantment is not an essential part of the pack. Extra 1/2 heart damage should stack with other damage buffs like strength and crits, as if the base damage of the weapon was 1 heart. Works with any stick item, without changing item data. Tag support may be added later, but does not currently exist. ## | Patreon | Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
